pi_items.source: Confirmed by inspecting the provided ExampleProject workspace files, where the 'ReqView Verification Tests' document is located in TESTS.json.
Task instruction text directly specifies setting the description to 'Verify SRS-3 functionality'.
Task instruction text explicitly requests a traceability link to 'SRS-3'. Verified that the 'SRS.json' document contains a section with id '3'.
Task instruction text references the 'SRS' document. Verified that the document ID defined in 'SRS.json' is indeed 'SRS'.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly ask to add a new test case object with the text 'Verify SRS-3 functionality' to the 'TESTS' document, and link it to the 'SRS-3' requirement in the 'SRS' document. Independent inspection confirms that the project consists of 'TESTS.json' and 'SRS.json' documents, where 'SRS.json' has the document ID 'SRS' and contains an object with ID '3'. The environment data is a synthetic 'ExampleProject' provided by the ReqView software vendor to demonstrate its capabilities.
